title: I feel I should continue to spread this kindness
author: KindlyCommittee8422
selftext:
I’m also grateful to a friend who shared some group resources with me.They helped me better read market trends and stay grounded in my decision-making, which gave me a solid start to the new year

Markets aren’t always exciting, but boring progress is still progress

Happy investing, and stay disciplined

comments.author: Interesting_Ebb5313
comments.body: can you please share the useful resources and group supports u got. tnx
